business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

positives: 24 years in business and 18 years with current management.
Written contracts are in place with all subcontractors.
Written contracts with indemnification are required from all contractors.
Building is fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R.
24-hour doorperson or security is present on premises.
Short-term rentals of less than 1 year are not permitted.
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring.
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years.
concerns: Commercial occupancy exists within the building.
EV charging stations are installed on the premises.
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities are present.
Prior insurance history shows 2 claims over the 2022-2024 period.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history: 2024 CNA Financial premium 414601.77 with 1 claim and no cancellations; 2023 Zurich Insurance Group premium 423914.72 with 0 claims and no cancellations; 2022 American International Group premium 447842.42 with 1 claim and no cancellations.
